zh.Sible Hedingham, Essex, England: 英國艾可希布爾 丁加姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret De Crewe於1213年出生在英國英格蘭爾可維時，她的父親Thomas de Crewe II33歲，母親Amice of Cheshire30歲。她於1230年與Randulph De Praers在英國結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1241年之後在英國艾可希布爾 丁加姆。

zh-hans.Sible Hedingham, Essex, England: 英国艾可希布爾 丁加姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret De Crewe于1213年出生在英国英格兰爾可維时，她的父亲Thomas de Crewe II33岁，母亲Amice of Cheshire30岁。她于1230年与Randulph De Praers在英国结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世于1241年之后在英国艾可希布爾 丁加姆。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Crewe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Crew
meanings: English: habitational name from Crewe in Cheshire or Crew in Cumberland, both named with Old Welsh criu ‘weir’. This denoted a wickerwork fence that was stretched across a river to catch fish.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret De Crewe was born in 1213, in Crewe, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas de Crewe II, was 33 and her mother, Amice of Cheshire, was 30. She married Randulph De Praers in 1230, in England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died after 1241, in Sible Hedingham, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret De Crewe est née en 1213, à Crewe, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas de Crewe II, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Amice of Cheshire, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Randulph De Praers en 1230, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée après 1241, à Sible Hedingham, Essex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret De Crewe 1213 in Crewe, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas de Crewe II 33 und ihre Mutter Amice of Cheshire 30. Sie hat 1230 in England Randulph De Praers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb nach 1241 in Sible Hedingham, Essex, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret De Crewe è nata il nel 1213 nel Crewe, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Thomas de Crewe II, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Amice of Cheshire, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Randulph De Praers nel 1230, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì dopo il 1241, nel Sible Hedingham, Essex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret De Creweが1213年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアクレウで生まれた時，父Thomas de Crewe IIは33歳，母Amice of Cheshireは30歳であった。1230年にイギリスでRandulph De Praersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女は1241年以後にイギリスエセックスシブル ヘディンガムで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret De Crewe(이)가 1213년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 크레w에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas de Crewe II(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Amice of Cheshire(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1230년 영국에서 Randulph De Praers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1241년 이후 영국 에세스 시블일 헤딩함에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret De Crewe nasceu em 1213, em Crewe, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas de Crewe II, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Amice of Cheshire, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Randulph De Praers em 1230, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ela faleceu após 1241, em Sible Hedingham, Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret De Crewe родилась в 1213 г. в местности крю, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas de Crewe II было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Amice of Cheshire, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Randulph De Praers в 1230 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла после 1241 г. в местности сибл хедингхам, эссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret De Crewe nació en 1213, en Crewe, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas de Crewe II, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Amice of Cheshire, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Randulph De Praers en 1230, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió después de 1241, en Sible Hedingham, Essex, Inglaterra.
